title: dolicholobium gertrudis
intro: Dolicholobium gertrudis, also known as the Gertrude's dolicholobium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dolicholobium gertrudis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are used to make a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
